prompt: Interior of a Royal Netherlands Air Force maintenance hangar at golden hour, camera at standing eye height on the smooth concrete floor. The hangar interior is completely empty: clean open polished concrete floor throughout, no aircraft inside, no vehicles, no equipment blocking the floor. Enormous hangar doors on one side are fully open onto the tarmac: a tandem-rotor Chinook helicopter parked outside on the apron in the middle distance, and beyond it a flat Dutch polder landscape with green fields and one traditional windmill on the horizon under a warm late-afternoon sunset sky. Low sun pours through the doorway in long golden god rays reflecting off the floor; interior fill light is cool and industrial from high fixtures. Roundel insignia wall art on the interior wall, dark green personnel door, steel truss roof structure. Palette: concrete grey, warm gold sunlight, soft orange sky. The concrete floor is clean, flat, and walkable throughout with a clear open area at least ten meters wide at the center. Atmosphere: thin dust haze, quiet end-of-day stillness. No people, no aircraft or equipment inside the hangar, no clutter on the floor, not night-time, not rain.
